objective: Complete an authorized text replacement in a visible Windows application using only visual evidence.
context: The application is offline and the task operates on a disposable project copy. Preserve original, English, and future Russian text in the durable mission state.

goals.objective: Find the exact visible source label, edit only that label, and commit the approved English text.
goals.context: The source is user-authored text. Do not modify identifiers, program logic, operands, addresses, constants, or hardware settings.
success_criteria: A fresh screenshot visibly proves that the approved English text is committed in the intended field.
No unexpected modal dialog or partial edit remains open.
